item.title: Are B2B Software Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: B2B Software Technologies Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a 2.90% decline in net sales from the previous quarter and a significant 74.19% drop in net profit, indicating operational challenges and inefficiencies that raise questions about the company's profitability and cost management. Time: Apr 12 2026 07:11 PM IST

item.title: Galaxy Surfactants Gains 8.35%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Rally
item.description: Galaxy Surfactants Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 8.35% from Rs.1,682.75 on 6 April to Rs.1,823.20 on 10 April 2026, comfortably outperforming the Sensex’s 5.34% gain over the same period. The stock’s rally was marked by a notable intraday surge on 8 April and a series of mixed but improving technical signals, reflecting cautious optimism amid broader market volatility. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Loyal Equipments Gains 4.78%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Loyal Equipments Ltd recorded a weekly gain of 4.78%, closing at Rs.183.00 on 10 April 2026, slightly underperforming the Sensex which rose 5.34% over the same period. The week was marked by a cautious upgrade in the company’s investment rating and a shift in valuation grade, reflecting mixed market sentiment amid ongoing financial challenges and technical improvements. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Ircon International Ltd Gains 8.38%: Key Intraday Rally and Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Ircon International Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 8.38% from Rs.125.95 on 6 April to Rs.136.50 on 10 April 2026, comfortably outperforming the Sensex’s 5.34% gain over the same period. The week was marked by a significant intraday surge and a notable gap up, reflecting positive trading momentum despite mixed technical signals and a recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Cera Sanitaryware Gains 7.70%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Rally
item.description: Cera Sanitaryware Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 7.70% from Rs.4,783.70 on 6 April to Rs.5,152.20 on 10 April 2026, outpacing the Sensex’s 5.34% gain over the same period. The stock’s trajectory was marked by notable intraday highs, technical momentum shifts, and mixed signals that shaped investor sentiment throughout the week. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd Gains 14.64%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Rally
item.description: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Ltd (MTNL) delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 14.64% from Rs. 25.68 on 6 April to Rs. 29.44 on 10 April 2026. This gain significantly outpaced the Sensex’s 5.34% advance over the same period, reflecting notable short-term momentum amid mixed longer-term technical signals and a recent downgrade to a 'Strong Sell' rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Asian Hotels (East) Ltd’s Mixed Week: -0.59% Price Change Amid Technical Upgrade
item.description: Asian Hotels (East) Ltd experienced a volatile week from 6 to 10 April 2026, closing marginally lower by 0.59% at Rs.159.15, while the Sensex surged 5.34% over the same period. The stock touched a new 52-week high midweek but ended the week under pressure amid mixed technical signals and a cautious upgrade in its investment rating. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: JTL Industries Ltd Gains 29.73%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Rally
item.description: JTL Industries Ltd delivered a remarkable weekly performance, surging 29.73% from Rs.49.62 on 6 April to Rs.64.37 on 10 April 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex’s 5.34% gain over the same period. The week was marked by exceptional volume spikes, multiple intraday highs, and a notable shift in technical momentum, reflecting renewed investor interest amid a volatile market backdrop. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST

item.title: Bhagiradha Chemicals Gains 6.54%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Bhagiradha Chemicals & Industries Ltd recorded a 6.54% gain over the week ending 10 April 2026, modestly outperforming the Sensex’s 5.34% rise. The stock exhibited notable volatility, with a peak at Rs.228.60 on 8 April before retreating and closing at Rs.223.95 on Friday. Mixed technical signals and a recent upgrade in rating from Strong Sell to Sell by MarketsMOJO characterised the week’s market narrative, reflecting cautious optimism amid persistent fundamental challenges. Time: Apr 12 2026 05:00 PM IST
